title: Senior Doctor - Lupin Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Lupin Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Lupin Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Hyderabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lupin Asia Pacific Associates:
Lupin Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lupin Asia Pacific Associates!
